## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Kathy Lam for the Account Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Transition:** The Account Director role is shifting from a dedicated-account model to a pooled, ticket-based system. This allows specialized ADs (e.g., in technical SEO) to support any client, matching expertise to specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Candidate Profile:** Kathy Lam's background in product management and marketing, with experience at startups and large companies (GitHub), aligns with the company's hybrid services/product model.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Strategic Mindset:** Lam's prioritization framework focuses on business impact and resource allocation, not just effort. She has experience launching major products (e.g., GitHub Copilot Enterprise) and building marketing from scratch (GrowthBook).](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Company Context:** The company is a high-growth startup onboarding \~2 clients/week with no outbound sales. The team is resourceful, having recently migrated to a new, 4-month-old internal platform.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Topics

### Company Context & Role Evolution

  - [**Business Model:** A marketing agency using an internal AI platform for organic blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Role Transition:** The Account Director role is moving from a dedicated-account model to a pooled, ticket-based system.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows specialized ADs to support any client, matching expertise (e.g., technical SEO) to specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**Future Vision:** Transition to a product-led company (mid-2026), with services remaining a core offering.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Candidate Profile & Experience

  - [**Background:** Technical computer engineering → Product Management → Product Marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Experience:** Startups (GrowthBook) and large companies (GitHub).](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Core Skills:** Product adoption, content strategy, and identifying customer "aha moments."](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Drawn to the role's hybrid nature, translating customer needs into product development.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Strategic & Project Leadership

  - [**Prioritization Framework:** Focuses on business impact, required resources, and resource allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Example:** Prioritized GitHub Copilot Enterprise over Codespaces due to higher revenue goals.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Initiative Ownership (GrowthBook):**](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Built marketing from scratch for an open-source A/B testing tool with technical co-founders.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Actions:** Conducted audits, defined strategy, and educated stakeholders on long-term results.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Major Accomplishment:**](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [**Project:** Transformed a niche web app security tool into a full-service offering in 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Secured resources to build a code-level vulnerability locator, solving a key customer pain point and enabling growth.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

### Team Coordination & Tooling

  - [**Coordination Method:** Uses a phased, process-driven approach (e.g., research → strategy → assignment) to drive work across teams.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [**Current Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
      - [**Airtable:** Source of truth for client content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [**Linear:** Used by ADs; considered too engineering-focused for high-level visual project management.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [**Notion:** General documentation and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Move Kathy Lam to the next interview stage.](https://fathom.video/share/xLYv2fePQGFGdN2f-iEiLGPhzU-An2aS?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
